message:
feat(fp-io): add read_csv parse_dates dict-style rename parity (br-frankenpandas-cxtw)

Adds CsvReadOptions.parse_date_combinations_named: Option<Vec<(String,
Vec<String>)>> matching pd.read_csv(parse_dates={'new_name':
['col1','col2',...]}). Each entry combines the named source columns
into a single datetime column with the caller-supplied name, rather
than the existing underscore-joined form.

Refactored apply_parse_date_combinations to delegate the combine +
to_datetime + header splice work to a shared
apply_one_parse_date_combination helper reused by the named variant.

5 new tests: dict-style rename, multiple named groups, duplicate
output-name rejection, missing-source-column rejection, empty-source
no-op.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
